programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El poder de la prensa
programme.desc: Frank enfrenta críticas públicas por una cámara corporal defectuosa durante un altercado. Danny y María protegen a un informante que es rechazado por el programa de protección de testigos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A punta de pistola
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan asesinatos de líderes comunitarios que parecen crímenes de odio. Frank se reúne con un grupo que busca justicia para las víctimas. Linda es asaltada y decide tomar medidas para aumentar su seguridad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos víctimas de asesinato se encuentran en una comunidad de West Virginia, el UAC descubre una disputa latente desde hacía tiempo entre dos familias, y se debe investigar cuál de ellos podría ser responsable de la muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La misión encubierta de Ziva toma un giro sorprendente y mortal cuando el asesino serial que ha estado siguiendo comienza a sospechar de ella.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Jimmy Palmer se convierte en el blanco del misterioso asesino que solo él puede reconocer.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El destino de todo el equipo está en riesgo en su búsqueda del asesino de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El destino del equipo entero está en juego, ya que buscan al asesino de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mata al mensajero
programme.desc: Frank se sorprende en una entrevista en vivo cuando él y el fiscal interino discrepan sobre un tema. Danny y su nuevo jefe chocan en sus métodos y personalidades mientras investigan un tiroteo desde un auto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El poder de la prensa
programme.desc: Frank enfrenta críticas públicas por una cámara corporal defectuosa durante un altercado. Danny y María protegen a un informante que es rechazado por el programa de protección de testigos.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Watching football turns a couple against each other, a cop gets fed up with a repeat shoplifter, and a man tries to swallow a bag of marijuana before officers find it.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a man about to confront his wife for her accusations about his sexuality, search a baton-wielding cyclist, and check the prints of a man with no identification.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in hiding is sniffed out quickly by the K-9 unit, a couple gets caught lying when an officer recognizes them, and a woman's dogs save her a trip to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted woman gives deputies a fake name, but her brother accidentally reveals the truth, and two officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS

programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some loose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue to divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike gets very upset when he defends Gloria on the subway since he never once in his life advocated violence.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: To change the public perception of their lodge Archie proposes that they let in a black Jewish fellow from his work.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett investigates the death of a young Asian girl on a flight from Bangkok to Honolulu. The girl was a heroin courier for a drug ring in Singapore. McGarrett sets out to dismantle the operation and uncover the truth behind the girl's death.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie and Tibbs investigate an allegation that a popular school teacher has molested a student; however, it seems that the people of Sparta have already passed judgement, and details from the teacher’s past only increase their suspicions.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A drug dealer flees the scene after he runs over a young boy. When the offender is arrested, Chief Gillespie is determined to see him stand trial, but the Feds offer him a deal that will set him free if he testifies against a powerful drug lord.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Lieutenant Bubba Skinner rekindles a romance with his high school sweetheart, the newly-widowed Christine Millings. To Bubba's surprise, her attorney is murdered and she's suddenly looking like the prime suspect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A killer ends up working with a witness to their crime.

programme.desc: In a teeming city, Kimble befriends an immigrant's young son, who, through a twist of fate, soon becomes his protector.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver gets drawn in to a wacky woman's struggle to keep a vintage violin out of the hands of opportunistic criminals.

programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.desc: Mrs. Briggs talks about her husband's disappearance into the woods. Nadine is put on the wrestling team, where she falls for Mike Nelson. James is hired by a mysterious wealthy woman named Evelyn Marsh. Dick takes on an orphan named Little Nicky.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Ben takes Bobby under his wing in a hope to destroy Hank and Jean. However, Ben's mental state is starting to crack. Cooper starts to look at buying real estate. Major Briggs's supervisor reveals that Briggs was studying transmissions from the woods.

programme.title: Twin Peaks

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble falls in love with a girl who happens to be a daytime parolee from a woman's prison.

programme.desc: In the wake of the birth of little Joey, Gloria and Michael are at odds with one another over communication issues.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is told by his doctor to go on a diet, or else he'll suffer serious health problems. He rejects the efforts of Edith, Mike and Gloria to stick with the diet, but Justin Quigley may provide the inspiration Archie needs.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With a lot of demands on Mike and Gloria's time - Joey needs a lot of care, and both of them working - the Stivics begin wondering when...or if they'll ever have time for each other.

programme.desc: Archie is determined to baptize Joey, especially over Mike's express wishes against it. When Edith begins refusing to allow Archie to be with Joey alone (knowing what will happen), Archie begins getting very sneaky.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Archie and Edith's furnace breaks down, they temporarily move in with Gloria and Mike. An already tense situation is made even more so thanks to a power blackout that rapidly spreads throughout the neighborhood.

programme.desc: When an ATM gives Mama $800 without charging her account, the family agrees she should keep it. But she returns to the bank and meets the man from whose account it was withdrawn.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama sits in on Vint's poker game when one of his friends has to cancel. After an evening of childhood stories, Vint ends the evening broke and belittled in front of his pals.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police in Albany, N.Y., get a surprise when a killer they think targets only older women is suspected in the murder of an elderly man. And the contents of a secret storage shed holds the grisly clues to a murder that has gone cold for more than 14 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: On a bitter morning in 1980, radio intern Helene Pruszynski is found brutalized in a snowy field. After 37 years of fruitless leads, investigators tap into a genealogy website that gives them a lead.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Rhode Island, policewomen go undercover as streetwalkers to nab the man suspected of murdering three prostitutes. And a dagger-shaped letter opener is the key piece of evidence that links a priest to the grisly 1980 murder of a nun in Ohio.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Testimony about the growth of larvae in dead bodies helps convict the man who stabbed a couple to death and strangled their 4-year-old daughter in 1993.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police reopen a rape-murder case 25 years after the crime and find enough DNA evidence to bring him to justice. And a confession made to a "Baywatch" TV star helps police solve the three-year-old riddle of a wealthy Newport Beach woman's murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Missouri, a part-time missionary is convicted, 38 years later, of killing her 5-year-old stepdaughter, and the skeleton of a Michigan boy, dead for 10 years, leads police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a deadly house fire claims the life of a family in rural Oklahoma, investigators suspect foul play and it sends a mother on a decades-long crusade to find out what happened to her missing teenage daughter and best friend.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A kidnapper grabs 8-year-old Chad Choice from his home in Texas, then torments his parents with two ransom demands. The case goes cold until the parents receive a chilling package in the mail that contains a letter--and a skull.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A look at the case of James Allen Selby, a serial rapist who eluded police for years while attacking 11 women in five states - Oklahoma, Nevada, California, Arizona, and Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a VA goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are finally able to zero in on the likely killer. And, in 1999 detectives test the blood evidence and develop a DNA profile of a shooting death from 1980.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A woman's fall from a cliff in the Grand Canyon leads police to uncover a series of grisly murders, and investigators smoke out a killer when they find crucial DNA evidence on his cigarette butts.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Halloween in a small town is canceled indefinitely when a young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un corredor de bolsa exitoso no regresa a casa después de su turno, su esposa lo reporta como desaparecido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el verano de 1986, el cuerpo de Kathleen Lipscomb fue encontrado en una carretera desierta en las afueras de San Antonio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, los cadáveres de Joan Rogers y sus dos hijas adolescentes fueron encontrados flotando en la Bahía de Tampa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesino probablemente esperaba cubrir sus huellas escenificando la escena del crimen. Pero los investigadores descubrieron el intento casi de inmediato y recurrieron a la ciencia forense para saber qué sucedió esa noche realmente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer quien se ha conocido por sufrir de depresión aparentemente se quitó su propia vida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Afición al veneno
programme.desc: Tres muertes aparentemente no relacionadas resultaron ser asesinatos en serie. El asesino había tenido cuidado: usó veneno que no tenía sabor ni olor.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After an apparent home invasion in Minnesota leaves Heidi Firkus dead and her husband, Nick, hospitalized, detectives learn the young couple was facing financial troubles.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A nurse is gunned down in her home and detectives believe they have a clear suspect; as they delve deeper into the investigation new information leads them down a completely different path.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a Florida firefighter reveals a tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a San Diego woman who is near death arrives at an emergency room, the FBI and local law enforcement are called in to try to solve a medical mystery and a horrific crime.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Ohio investigators search for answers in the decades-old murder of 10-year-old Amy Mihaljevic; a retracing of Amy's steps from the day of the kidnapping.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A deadly high-speed chase in Montana leads "Dateline" on a search through 50 years of history to unravel the mystery of how one man turned into a monster and committed one of the state's most notorious crimes.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: During a weekend away, a longtime married couple go on an afternoon hike that ends in tragedy; a multitude of evidence makes the mystery hard to untangle.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Dr. Teresa Sievers is found murdered in her kitchen, detectives struggle to find any leads until an unexpected tip changes everything; the woman who helped investigators speaks out.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The life of the charming con man who went by the name Clark Rockefeller.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Halloween becomes tragic for a young woman when her fiancé is killed at a local bar.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A girl's recovery from a gunshot wound inspires the community to get her justice.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigating the murder of a brilliant professor.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A group of women helps bring down a smooth talking serial predator turned killer who lured young women with promises of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Clip Show

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Parlez Vous Flavor
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a dramatic twist of plans in Cannes, it's down to Flav's final girls.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reunion After The Lovin
programme.desc: On the reunion episode, Flav and 20 girls talk about what happened on the show and what is going on in the lives right now.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: With Vinny acting as host of the show, Pauly gets to know the first set of single ladies by asking them to freestyle about their personalities while he DJs.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: With Pauly acting as host of the show, it's Vinny's turn to get to know the singles during one-on-one sit-downs and a revealing trivia competition.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Vinny makes a connection at a dance party, one of the women wants out of the house, and Vinny and Pauly duke it out for the chance to take some of the ladies out on a date.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny bring the boardwalk to California, jealousy rises as sparks fly between Pauly and another single, and the group reveals their dirty laundry.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off for the chance at a one-on-one date with a single, and emotions run high throughout the house when Nikki starts a rumor.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off in a Double Shot debate, the singles vote for superlatives in the house, and Nikki shows the guys a different side of herself.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Coming in hot with her aggressive, confrontational approach, Pauly and Vinny's Jersey Shore roommate Angelina drops in to sort out which ladies are there for the right reason.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny's bromance hits a rough patch when they both fall for the same woman, and drama erupts in the house when Nikki's jealousy rubs the other ladies the wrong way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and is affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia, but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son, Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital, and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis that they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: The AUSA turns up the heat on Ghost and implicates his inner circle in a RICO; Ghost and Tommy plan to frame Dre for the murder of Raymond Jones, Raina's killer; Angela and Tasha enact a plan of their own.

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Shamrock Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,the TAPS team has been asked to go to Paddy Reilly's Bar in Manhattan, New York to help explain some after hours activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Spirits of Jersey
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,the TAPS team visits the Absecon Lighthouse in Atlantic City, NJ. This lighthouse has activity reported ranging from untraceable footsteps and doors opening spontaneously, to coughing coming from the keeper's quarters.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Touched By Evil
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to The Southern Mansion in Cape May, NJ, and have enlisted the help of Dave Tango's father, Bruce.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Reform School
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters the TAPS team investigates Preston Castle, a once notorious reform school for boys in Northern California.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts in the Attic
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS has been called to the Grzelak house in Massachusetts where they have been experiencing paranormal activity since the day they moved in 30 years ago.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Inn of the Dead
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is called to Cape Cod to investigate the Orleans Inn. Some of the claims here are that candles light on their own, glasses slide off tables, and hauntings by two separate men who hung themselves.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Spirits of the Night
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS visits the home of the Scully family, who are so terrified they are ready to pack up and move.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Norwich State
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS becomes the first paranormal team to be invited to investigate Norwich State Hospital, in Norwich, Connecticut.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Hotel
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS drivesto the Otesaga Resort Hotel in Cooperstown, NY. Employees are terrified by voices calling out to themand doors swinging all on their own.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: America's First Zoo
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to the oldest zoo in the country, The Philadelphia Zoo, which boastsa reported Native American burial ground that lies beneath the grounds.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Uninvited Guests
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been asked to help the 1875 Inn in Tilton, New Hampshire. The Inn has had two major fires, one of which supposedly took the life of a child named Laura, who now haunts the hotel.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS visits the location of the \\"shot heard round the world\\" at the Colonial Inn in Concord, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Signals From the Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is on Rose Island to investigate their haunted lighthouse. This island housed cholera victims exiled from Newport, and many of the sick never returned to the mainland.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Lemp Mansion
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is invited to Lemp Mansion in St. Louis, Missouri. There have been tragic deaths at this mansion with the patriarch and three of his children taking their own lives.

programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie

programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Tina Turner: Simply the Best

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When his daughter is jailed for contempt Matlock takes over her case. Now it is up to him to uncover the truth behind a sinister cover-up that involves high government officials, including the Chief of Police, in a child pornography ring and a murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A crooked photographer is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: D.A. Julie March refuses to back away from a closed case in which her prime murder suspect commits suicide and, after his death, allegedly disposes of a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A craving for a down-home barbecue in the inner city leads Matlock into a dangerous situation. After his car breaks down, he’s mugged at knifepoint. Even his barbecue dinner is stolen! However; one good samaritan, Stan Johnson, comes to his aid.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Beware of the black widow! A jealous girlfriend is a dangerous woman and Ray, one half of the popular Rick & Ray radio talk show, has the bullets in his chest to prove it! Now Matlock must get the evidence he needs to convict, but it won’t be easy.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: When Polish President Lech Kaczyński is killed in a plane crash, investigators discover that this was not simply a pilot error.

programme.desc: Investigators try to find the cause of two similar air crashes that happened nearly 12 years apart.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.desc: Madison's easy beachfront sale becomes jeopardized when his client works with another agent; Josh Flagg's historical party pad attracts eyes, but no offers; Josh Altman has a hard time keeping two Santa Monica listings straight.

programme.desc: Josh Altman finds himself caught between his fiancée and his client; Josh Flagg struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listing; James and David cannot see eye-to-eye on a price for their sexy, contemporary listing.

programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern and must fight off developers who want to bulldoze it; Josh and Heather return home from their wedding to find their dream house; James and David are asked to help a developer who previously rejected them.

programme.desc: Josh Altman is preoccupied with Heather's pregnancy; Josh Flagg is ready to dance to the top of the market while waltzing down the aisle with his fiancé; James has unresolved issues with Madison over a huge listing; a new realtor enters the fray.

programme.desc: Josh Altman has high rollers from Chicago in town, looking to wheel and deal; James and David throw a giant open house focused on families; Tracy holds Bradley's hand as they put his first development project on the market.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to free John Darcy, the leader of a liberation movement in West Africa, and end the tyrannical rule of his captor, Colonel Alex Kohler, a ruthless segregationist in the "Kitara"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The whereabouts of a list of enemy agents operating in the United States are locked in the memory of a captured spy, Col. Vanin (guest star Frank Marth), and no one, including the spy, can penetrate his mind in "The Party"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Sanders guest stars, one of the world's largest dealers in illegal arms, who is about to complete a deal involving guerilla groups in North Africa and the Middle East in "The Merchant"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how spoons are made. King Friday demands that Lady Aberlin and Robert Troll create a mountain beside the castle. Mary Alice Sherred makes music with spoons.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Conoce a Rojo, el más nuevo y brillante camión de bomberos. Rojo invita a nuestros héroes a acompañarlo en su primera misión de rescate: ayudar a un gatito que está atrapado en un árbol y no puede bajar.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿A quién le pedimos ayuda cuando no sabemos para dónde ir? ¡A Mapa! Pero en esta ocasión, un pájaro distraído se lo lleva a la gran montaña, y Dora y Botas tienen que confiar en su propio sentido de orientación para llegar allí.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es el Día de las Madres y Dora quiere ayudar a Papi a cocinarle una torta a mamá. Pero faltan tres importantes ingredientes: bananas, nueces y chocolate. ¿Podrá, junto a Botas, conseguirlos todos?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Vamos Exploradores Dorados! Dora y sus amigos formaron un equipo de fútbol y juegan contra los grandes dinosaurios. ¿Podrá Dora anotar un gol?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Feliz Navidad! Es nochebuena y Dora y Botas van camino al Polo Norte para llevale un regalo a Santa. Tendrán que cruzar las montañas nevadas y el río congelado, pero al final de su viaje, todos se llenarán del espíritu de dar.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Achú, achú! ¿Qué es ese sonido? Benny, el toro, tiene un ataque de estornudos y no puede dejar de estornudar. ¡Doctora Dora al rescate!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡IIII jaaa! Dora, la vaquera, y Botas, el vaquero, van al lejano Oeste para entregar un paquete especial de galletas de vaqueros a Benny, el toro. Pero en su camino, deberán cuidarse de Swiper, el zorro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En el centro comercial, Perro y Gato se sientan sobre el regazo de Santa cuando una malcriada niña (la sobrina de Rancio el Conejo) anuncia que quiere a Perro y Gato como regalo de Navidad.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato logran conseguir un nuevo trabajo como Perro Bombero en el departamento de bomberos de Nearburg. / Perro entra al espectáculo de perros de Nearburg y se disfraza como un afgano peludo con corte de cabello.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El hambriento Perro y Gato comen una tonelada de comida en Rib Room, se ponen muy obesos y desafortunadamente no pueden pagar la cuenta de un muy altísimo costo. / Perro y Gato convierten su casa en un hotel de lujo para ganar dinero.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Shriek decide renunciar a los Grasosos y cumplir su sueño de ser campeón de patinaje sobre hielo. / Perro se golpea en la cabeza mientras persigue el camión de la basura y le da amnesia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras pasean por la Feria Estatal, Perro y Gato se encuentran montando sobre un feroz toro. / El odontólogo Rancio el Conejo descubre que cualquier cosa que Perro coma, afecta a los dientes de Gato y viceversa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: A pesar de las objeciones de Gato, Perro arrastra a Gato al Parque Temático para subirse a Butt Buster, una montaña rusa que va a 200 millas por hora. / El Alcalde Rancio necesita más fondos para su tina de monedas de oro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato en bancarrota, bailan en la calle, pintan retratos de las personas y venden una manzana podrida a Cliff, el perro Grasoso. / Aparece un gorila en la casa de Perro y Gato justo cuando estaban saliendo al bowling.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están descansando en el jardín cuando se encuentran con Lola Caricola, que se muda al árbol que tienen en el jardín. / Perro y Gato trabajan como empresa de catering en una lujosa fiesta en una mansión de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El automóvil de Perro y Gato se rompe y se ven obligados de llevarlo al taller de Lube. / Perro encuentra la vieja cámara de Gato y pasea por todo Nearburg tomando fotografías de personas en situaciones vergonzosas.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se tropiezan con un plató de cine, y se convierten en dobles. / Perro y Gato convencen a Lola de infiltrarse entre los Grasosos para conocer sus hábitos y encontrar sus debilidades.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se convierte en tierra invernal y Perro y Gato, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis y los perros Grasosos aprovechan la oportunidad para pasear en trineo por la nieve. / Perro obtiene un equipo de hipnosis de juguete.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro construye su propio Camión de Monstruos y arrastra a Gato hasta la plaza de Nearburg para participar del Rally de camiones de monstruos. / Lola convence a Perro y Gato de producir miel en el jardín.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato pelean durante el almuerzo y continúan en la cocina, tiran harina, azúcar, chocolate y frutas por todo el lugar. / Perro y Gato heredan algunas tierras en la costa del hermoso lago Wanamaker, empacan sus cosas y se van.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se siente atormentado por el gigante gato que les recuerda al monstruo Gatozilla de la película. / Perro y Gato van hacia la Caleta de Nearburg para encontrar el tesoro que se hundió con el pirata Barba Naranja.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Después de un accidente golpeando hierro, Cliff cambia y se convierte en un perro nuevo, promete dejar de hacer cosas malas. / Perro y Gato se convierten en el perro lazarillo para el ciego multimillonario TJ Wolfington.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se transportan al año 3001 para luchar contra el malvado Gran Tito. / Lola vence a Gato por primera vez en la Convención de Inventos de Nearburg y lo que convierte a Gato en un enemigo envidioso.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Walt, el pavo del desfile de Acción de Gracias, aparece en la casa de Perro y Gato buscando refugio. Perro lo hace entrar y el hambriento Gato lo quiere devorar.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es la noche de Halloween y Gato, se disfraza como Duque Kahanamoku de Hawai y Perro, se disfraza como Conde Perrdrácula, salen en busca de dulces. Un vampiro peruano, Nosferacho, muerde a Perro y lo convierte en vampiro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está entusiasmado porque hoy es el Día de Bromas Raras, la versión del Día de los Inocentes. / Perro y Gato se preparan para volver al reencuentro de la vieja escuela, en donde Gato quiere reavivar su romance con Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el Día Anual de los Padres y, como siempre, Gato y Perro quedan excluidos porque no tienen padres. Perro espera que este año sus padres finalmente aparezcan. Gato insiste en que la búsqueda es en vano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback sheds light on how Sanji came to join the crew, and Chopper’s backstory is revealed through memories of a visit to a snow-covered island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback reveals Robin’s motives for cooperating with CP9, Nami’s shocking discovery about the archaeologist’s past, and Luffy’s determination to save his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky stands up to Spandam by destroying what the madman desires most, and the sound of the sea train spurs the Straw Hats to make a daring leap of faith!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy races to rescue Robin while the rest of the Straw Hats set off in search of the five keys needed to unlock the archaeologist!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Usopp and Zoro go head-to-head with a couple of animal assassins, Sanji teaches the most beautiful member of CP9 the secrets of making good tea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into trouble trying to sail his way to Robin, Usopp and Zoro end up handcuffed together, and Sanji’s inability to kick a women may lead to serious injury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chimney and Gombe show Luffy the secret passage that leads to Robin, and Franky puts on a display of raw punching power thanks to a few bottles of cola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Franky’s brawl spills into the ocean, Usopp and Sanji attempt to overcome their handcuffs by outsmarting their opponents!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Travel back to ancient Japan for a madcap adventure starring the Straw Hats, some old friends and enemies, and a camel that eats lottery tickets!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashback to the dark past of Rob Lucci as the young boy learns to dispense a cold, cruel, and brutal brand of justice. Back in real time, Luffy’s battle with Lucci threatens to destroy the navy fleet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s gigantic attack on Lucci takes a devastating toll on his body, Robin rejoins the fight, and the rest of the Straw Hats struggle to survive underwater!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Snapped

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón sumerge a Ciudad Grisácea en la oscuridad, Ash y sus amigos van a investigar a la planta de energía cercana, donde encuentran a Magnemite y un huésped de Grimer. ¿Serán responsables del apagón en la ciudad?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
